runtimeBoundary: Desktop and MCP are separate TypeScript consumers of @zine/protocol; this repository has no independent non-JavaScript folder-chain reader.

fileChains.name: backslash-name file advances with Unicode content

folderChains.name: nested folder add rename remove advance and explicit Step
Root receives every nested frontier and explicit Step

malformedFolderChains.name: q tags disagree with canonical member order
child-advance source skips the new immediate child head
explicit Step carries a derived advance

operations.name: file genesis adds a nested member and advances Root
rename advances the exact immediate folder through Root
remove advances the exact immediate folder through Root
file advance propagates through every ancestor
explicit folder Step remains distinct from Root roll-up
explicit Root Step is the only deliberate checkpoint
same-operation retry rejects a regenerated second explicit folder Step
recovery rejects a split operation id at the final ancestor

structuralPrefixes.name: leaf-advance node prefixes before the complete ancestor set
structuralPrefixes.scope: Structural node-presence data only. Executable crash/retry writer recovery is exercised by apps/mcp/integration/recursive-checkpoint-recovery.ts.
